activities.title: Smarter plays: How AI is changing the game
activities.description: AI is reshaping the $680 billion sports industry - not just on the field, but in how we connect, compete, and experience the game. Join Maria Sharapova and Sarah Meron as they explore how the same AI powering leading enterprises is transforming sports.

activities.title: The business of saving the planet
activities.description: Albert from UBQ Materials discusses how climate action can be both a smart business decision and a sustainable choice. Discover how turning everyday waste into valuable materials can drive innovation, profit, and real environmental impact.

activities.title: The CEO's role in brand resilience & cultural relevance
activities.description: A candid conversation exploring how CEOs can shape resilient brands and foster cultural relevance in an ever-changing world. This session unpacks the leadership mindset, strategic choices, and authentic storytelling needed to keep organizations connected...

activities.title: The community of founders pledging billions for good
activities.description: It’s no secret that founders and investors can generate immense wealth by building the right companies and backing the right ideas. But what if they committed to impact as boldly as they committed to growth? Meet Founders Pledge, a global community of...

activities.title: How to turn into an AI first company
activities.description: AI is shaking up SaaS, and not every company makes the leap. In this chat, Intercom co-founder Des Traynor unpacks his journey through an AI pivot, the tough calls along the way, and the lessons learned along the way.

activities.title: A post-American, enshittification-resistant internet
activities.description: The Internet didn’t have to be like this. Author, Cory Doctorow, and Rabble, a long-term advocate for decentralized technology, will explore how and why “enshittification” happened, including the role of US trade reps who used the threat of tariffs to bully...

activities.title: The new frontier: AI meets Hollywood
activities.description: As Hollywood evolves, AI is no longer a disruption, it's a collaborator. Actor Scott Eastwood and Jonathan Yunger, producer and Co-founder & CEO of Arcana Labs, explore how artificial intelligence is reshaping the art and business of storytelling. Through...

activities.title: Hanging in the balance
activities.description: World Wide Web inventor Sir Tim Berners-Lee has been anticipating 'agents' since the mid-1990s. They're finally here, thanks to the Generative AI revolution. But what kind of web will these agents encounter, and what kind of web will they leave behind? Join...

activities.title: Scaling Mobile Apps: From 0 to 1M Users
activities.description: In this hands-on workshop, learn the infrastructure and performance strategies required to scale your React Native application to millions of users without compromising speed.

activities.title: Deep Dive into UI/UX Trends for 2026
activities.description: Explore the upcoming trends in digital design, from neumorphism's evolution to accessibility-first interfaces. Participants will work on a collaborative design challenge.

activities.title: Crypto & Coffee: Morning Market Live
activities.description: A live podcast session discussing the morning's crypto market movements and the impact of institutional adoption on decentralized finance.

activities.title: Cybersecurity in the Age of Quantum
activities.description: Prepare for the next decade of threats. Learn how quantum computing will change encryption and what you can do to keep your data safe today.

activities.title: Future of Fintech
activities.description: Global leaders discuss how digital currencies and embedded finance are changing the way we pay and save.
